message:
feat(scanner): add depth-3 artifact scanning and pattern breakdown logging

Two improvements to the artifact scanner:

1. Depth-3 scanning for workspace patterns:
   Previously the scanner checked depth-1 (project root) and depth-2
   (e.g., myproject/target/) directories. This misses Rust workspace
   patterns like myproject/crates/foo/target/ where build artifacts live
   at depth 3.

   New behavior: when a depth-2 directory is classified as Unknown (not
   an artifact itself), its children are now scanned at depth 3. Each
   depth-3 directory is checked for .git (to avoid treating nested repos
   as deletion candidates) and then classified. Matching artifacts are
   added to the scoring queue.

2. Pattern frequency breakdown in priority dispatch log:
   The "[SBH-SCANNER] priority pre-scan dispatched N candidates" log
   line now includes a breakdown showing how many candidates matched
   each pattern (e.g., "target/×12, node_modules/×3, claude-*×2").
   Uses extract_pattern_label() for consistent labeling, sorted by
   frequency descending.

Also syncs Cargo.lock to reflect 0.3.15 version from previous commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
